title: ChatPointsTTV - Twitch & TikTok integration for Streamers
description: Integrate your gameplay stream with your audience. Minecraft in-game interactions through Channel Points, Donations, Likes and more! Compatible with Twitch and TikTok livestreams.
body:
ChatPointsTTV is a Spigot plugin designed to foster interaction between streamers and their audience on Twitch or TikTok LIVE. Set up your own rewards in exchange for engagement on your streams (such as Twitch Channel Points, follows, donations, subscriptions...). Spawn mobs, give items or run any command when an event occurs. 

Possibilities to connect with your audience are endless!

To set up the plugin you just need to login or link your LIVE and setup events to your liking. For installation instructions and more information about the plugin, please visit the [documentation website](https://gosdev.me/chatpointsttv/install/).

## Features
- Free
- Fully Customizable
- Support for simultaneous streams
- In-game Stream Chat
- Open Source

## Available Actions
- Spawning entities
- Giving items
- Applying potion effects
- Removing random inventory items
- Inventory shuffling
- Running commands
- Explosions
